_comment: RESTCONF entry points keyed by alias. DNOS does not run RESTCONF natively on current builds (see README.md); production access goes via ODL controllers acting as NETCONF→RESTCONF gateways. Each entry describes one RESTCONF speaker (ODL today; native DNOS endpoints will be added when/if a build ships /restconf on the box). Per-device 'mount' info under each ODL is what gets PUT to /restconf/config/network-topology:.../node/<NAME>.

odl-lab1._uri_style_note: Legacy ODL RFC-7895 path style: keyed list entries are /list/key (NOT RFC-8040 /list=key). RFC-8040 form returns 400 unknown-element on this build.

module_name_quirks._comment: YANG module name on the wire. Top container element name is 'drivenets-top' but the module that defines it is 'dn-top', so RESTCONF URIs start /dn-top:drivenets-top/... — not /drivenets-top:drivenets-top/...
